LanguageData.PM_Scenario_SweeperEmergence.label: Sweeper Emergence
LanguageData.PM_Scenario_SweeperEmergence.description: You are Sweepers, exiled from the City. Far from the Backstreets you were meant to clean, you must survive on this rimworld and rebuild a family. Maintain your vital fuel, sweep the filth and grow the family.
LanguageData.PM_Scenario_SweeperEmergence.scenario.su: Two Sweepers, one Mother, two Hooks, some steel, components and a little food.
LanguageData.PM_Scenario_SweeperEmergence.scenario.de: Two Sweepers awaken after a crash. Without Vital Fuel, they are doomed. The Mother they carry can create more of them — but first they must survive.
